extract: Route 15 (Japanese: １５番道路 Route 15) is a route in northern Kalos, connecting Laverre City, Dendemille Town, and Route 16. The route is also known as Brun Way (Japanese: ブラン通り Brun Way). At the gate from Laverre City, a pair of Team Flare Grunts initially block the player from entering this route. The route becomes accessible once the player defeats Bryony and Celosia at the Poké Ball Factory.
